feed.title: Somerset County Registry of Deeds
feed.subtitle: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. Domain is hyphenated 'somersetcounty-me.org'; monitors fee-schedule content.

entry.title: Monitoring started: Somerset County Registry of Deeds
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
